subcodes.title: Words to some pilgrims, spoken on 1914-02-23
subcodes.first_line: Tell me, what voice is heard in thy city? Is it the voice of an earthly singer or the voice of the Cause of God?... The charm and beauty of the voice of Truth attract the hearts and spiritualize the thoughts
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @music and singing, @the power of words; of speech
